title: callicarpa prolifera var. rubroglandulosa
intro: Callicarpa prolifera var. rubroglandulosa, also known as the purple callicarpa, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Asia, characterized by its vibrant purple berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa prolifera var. rubroglandulosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's berries are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
